apps.name: Flashback Remote
apps.subtitle: Wireless control for the ONE35 V2
apps.localizedDescription:
Remove the 27-photo roll limit on your Flashback ONE35 V2 and wirelessly transfer DNG files — all from one app, no USB needed.

• Set any roll length up to 100 frames
• One-tap camera WiFi connection
• Transfer DNGs and JPEGs wirelessly
• Embedded RAW editor (Flashback PWA)
• No cloud account required

versions.localizedDescription:
UI refresh and faster transfers.

• Settings is now its own tab
• Redesigned Camera screen with a clearer connect/scan flow
• Pull-to-refresh in the Editor tab
• Up to 3 files download in parallel — noticeably faster transfers
• New app icon
• Various polish

First production release of Flashback Remote.

• Remove the 27-photo roll limit (set any length up to 100)
• One-tap camera WiFi and wireless DNG/JPEG transfer
• USB import via the Files app
• DNGs-only and always-delete options
• Compatibility self-test for new firmware
• Embedded Flashback RAW editor
